final:
module SRAM_4bit (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);

    reg [3:0] storage;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin storage <= data_in ; // Write operation
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= storage ;
  end
endmodule
